tasks.title: PostgreSQL Scaling and Backup
subtasks: Scale CloudNative-PG from 1 to 3 replicas for high availability.
Enable PgBouncer connection pooling for efficient database connections.
Configure automated daily backups and WAL archiving to S3 for disaster recovery.

tasks.title: Redis/Valkey High Availability
subtasks: Enable Redis Sentinel with 3 replicas for high availability and automatic failover.
Configure maxmemory policy to prevent out-of-memory issues and ensure cache efficiency.

tasks.title: NATS Cluster and Persistence
subtasks: Scale NATS to a 3-node cluster for high availability and increased throughput.
Configure JetStream persistence for reliable message delivery and event streaming.

tasks.title: TLS Certificate Management
subtasks: Implement cert-manager to provision and manage TLS certificates (e.g., Let's Encrypt) for all external-facing services.
Automate certificate renewal processes.

tasks.title: Ingress Controller Configuration
subtasks: Configure a robust Ingress controller (e.g., NGINX or Envoy) for external traffic routing and load balancing.
Define Ingress rules for all application services.

tasks.title: CDN Configuration for Static Assets
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare CDN for caching and serving static assets (e.g., images from S3/R2) to improve performance and reduce load on origin servers.
Integrate Cloudflare Tunnel for secure exposure of internal services.

tasks.title: Advanced Network Policies
subtasks: Implement fine-grained network policies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic based on least privilege principles.
Ensure only necessary communication paths are allowed between services and namespaces.

tasks.title: OpenTelemetry Collector Configuration
subtasks: Deploy and configure OpenTelemetry collectors across the cluster.
Define appropriate sampling rates for traces to balance observability and resource usage.

tasks.title: Jaeger Trace Storage
subtasks: Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage configured for long-term retention of traces.
Ensure Jaeger is integrated with OpenTelemetry collectors for end-to-end tracing.

tasks.title: SLO Alerting Rules
subtasks: Define and implement alert rules for Service Level Objective (SLO) violations across critical services.
Integrate alerts with a notification system (e.g., PagerDuty, Slack).
